'''thongataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:liberalward|liberalward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liberalward|liberalward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thongataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongatithi|thongatithi]] || [[word:thongatiji|thongatiji]] || [[word:thongatishi|thongatishi]] || [[word:thongatiki|thongatiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongatuthuthu|thongatuthuthu]] || [[word:thongatujuju|thongatujuju]] || [[word:thongatushushu|thongatushushu]] || [[word:thongatukuku|thongatukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongatuthu|thongatuthu]] || [[word:thongatuju|thongatuju]] || [[word:thongatushu|thongatushu]] || [[word:thongatuku|thongatuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatufthuf|thongatufthuf]] || [[word:thongatufjuf|thongatufjuf]] || [[word:thongatufshuf|thongatufshuf]] || [[word:thongatufkuf|thongatufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongatethe|thongatethe]] || [[word:thongateje|thongateje]] || [[word:thongateshe|thongateshe]] || [[word:thongateke|thongateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongatothotho|thongatothotho]] || [[word:thongatojojo|thongatojojo]] || [[word:thongatoshosho|thongatoshosho]] || [[word:thongatokoko|thongatokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongatotho|thongatotho]] || [[word:thongatojo|thongatojo]] || [[word:thongatosho|thongatosho]] || [[word:thongatoko|thongatoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatofthof|thongatofthof]] || [[word:thongatofjof|thongatofjof]] || [[word:thongatofshof|thongatofshof]] || [[word:thongatofkof|thongatofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfthĂŻf|thongatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfjĂŻf|thongatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfshĂŻf|thongatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfkĂŻf|thongatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thongatĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thongatĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thongatĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thongatĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfthĂŻf|thongatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfjĂŻf|thongatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfshĂŻf|thongatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfkĂŻf|thongatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfthĂŻf|thongatĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfjĂŻf|thongatĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfshĂŻf|thongatĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thongatĂŻfkĂŻf|thongatĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thongatĂŠthĂŠ|thongatĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thongatĂŠjĂŠ|thongatĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thongatĂŠshĂŠ|thongatĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thongatĂŠkĂŠ|thongatĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thongatathatha|thongatathatha]] || [[word:thongatajaja|thongatajaja]] || [[word:thongatashasha|thongatashasha]] || [[word:thongatakaka|thongatakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongatatha|thongatatha]] || [[word:thongataja|thongataja]] || [[word:thongatasha|thongatasha]] || [[word:thongataka|thongataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongatafthaf|thongatafthaf]] || [[word:thongatafjaf|thongatafjaf]] || [[word:thongatafshaf|thongatafshaf]] || [[word:thongatafkaf|thongatafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thongatasha|thongatasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongatshĂ«sha|thongatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongatrosha|thongatrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongatmusha|thongatmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongatyasha|thongatyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongatnkshĂ«sha|gothongatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongatnkrosha|gothongatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongatnkmusha|gothongatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongatnkyasha|gothongatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thongangatasha|thongangatasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongangatshĂ«sha|thongangatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongangatrosha|thongangatrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongangatmusha|thongangatmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongangatyasha|thongangatyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongangatnkshĂ«sha|gothongangatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongangatnkrosha|gothongangatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongangatnkmusha|gothongangatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongangatnkyasha|gothongangatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thengĂŠtasha|thengĂŠtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thengĂŠtshĂ«sha|thengĂŠtshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thengĂŠtrosha|thengĂŠtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thengĂŠtmusha|thengĂŠtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thengĂŠtyasha|thengĂŠtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothengĂŠtnkshĂ«sha|gothengĂŠtnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothengĂŠtnkrosha|gothengĂŠtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothengĂŠtnkmusha|gothengĂŠtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothengĂŠtnkyasha|gothengĂŠtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thongfatasha|thongfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thongfatshĂ«sha|thongfatshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thongfatrosha|thongfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thongfatmusha|thongfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thongfatyasha|thongfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothongfatnkshĂ«sha|gothongfatnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothongfatnkrosha|gothongfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothongfatnkmusha|gothongfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothongfatnkyasha|gothongfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
